pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version properties from 11 to 17 to align with the JDK 17 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 17; keeping the compiler target at 11 would prevent the use of JDK 17 features and may cause compatibility issues with dependencies requiring JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Keycloak version property from 12.0.4 to 22.0.0 to match the newer Keycloak release.
pom.xml.why_exists: Keycloak 22.0.0 requires JDK 17 and has breaking API changes compared to 12.0.4; using the old version would cause runtime failures or incompatibility with the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the testcontainers-keycloak version from 1.6.1-SNAPSHOT to 3.0.0 to support Keycloak 22.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older testcontainers-keycloak versions are incompatible with Keycloak 22 and JDK 17, leading to runtime errors during tests.
